title: Smart Traffic Navigation Focus on Density
description: A Master's in AI research project integrating AIoT and Edge Computing. The system processes real-time traffic camera streams using YOLO models for vehicle counting and classification, calculates traffic density, and broadcasts optimal route suggestions to users via a central app to alleviate urban congestion.
detailedDescription: Designed and implemented an intelligent traffic management system as part of a Master's thesis. Leveraged YOLOv8 for real-time multi-class vehicle detection on edge devices (NVIDIA Jetson). Integrated MQTT protocol for low-latency communication between AIoT camera units and a FastAPI cloud broker. Built a dynamic routing engine using A* search weighted by real-time vehicle density index.

title: Blind Source Separation (BSS) - Audio Splitter
description: An audio source separation application based on the state-of-the-art Open-Unmix (UMX) deep learning model. Separates a single mixed audio file (MP3, WAV) into 4 independent stems (Vocals, Drums, Bass, Other). Features a FastAPI processing backend, CustomTkinter desktop app, and Flet (Flutter) mobile client.
detailedDescription: Implemented blind source separation utilizing PyTorch and pre-trained Open-Unmix architectures. Developed an asynchronous audio processing pipeline in FastAPI using Celery to handle queueing of large files. Constructed two separate frontend clients: a desktop GUI using CustomTkinter with Pygame audio integration, and a mobile client built in Flet (Python-based Flutter wrapper) showcasing cross-platform versatility.

title: InvestTool - AI Financial Assistant
description: An automated financial analytics and alert platform. Uses web scrapers to gather financial news, processes market sentiments with OpenAI GPT models, and broadcasts automated trading advice and VIP signals via a Telegram bot scheduled through Celery and Redis.
detailedDescription: Built an automated data pipeline that periodically scrapes financial news and stock tickers. Integrated OpenAI's Chat Completion API with custom prompt engineering to summarize market sentiments and identify trading signals. Deployed Redis as a broker for Celery periodic tasks (celery-beat) to check VIP signal triggers and push real-time alerts to Telegram VIP channels with 88% verification accuracy.

title: Sova Project - Realtime Speech-to-Text & AI Summarizer
description: A real-time speech-to-text platform designed for meeting transcriptions and summaries. Uses WebSockets for streaming live audio, translates audio to text, and integrates OpenAI GPT to generate automated meeting minutes and actionable tasks.
detailedDescription: Designed a high-concurrency audio ingestion pipeline using ASP.NET Core WebSockets. Streamed audio bytes directly to cloud transcription APIs and synchronized text updates back to a Next.js frontend in real-time. Built post-meeting analytics integrating OpenAI's API to extract key summary items, decisions made, and assigned action points. Utilized Azure Blob Storage for secure audio archiving.

title: Smart Cafeteria Ordering & Management System
description: An end-to-end smart ordering platform supporting QR-based table orders. Integrates SignalR for real-time kitchen tracking, order grouping algorithms to optimize kitchen prep workflows, promotions, coupons, and secure online payment gateways.
detailedDescription: Developed a comprehensive enterprise system for cafeteria operations. Designed order processing mechanisms utilizing RabbitMQ to decouple order placements from notifications. Implemented SignalR Hubs for instant UI state synchronization between the customer mobile view, kitchen display board, and cashier desk. Highlighted as a Graduation Project with high distinction.

title: Traffic Sign Classification (SVM & PCA)
description: A computer vision model classifying traffic road signs from autonomous driving feeds. Utilizes Support Vector Machines (SVM) combined with Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to reduce feature dimensions, ensuring real-time performance on edge devices.
detailedDescription: Preprocessed raw traffic sign images using OpenCV for normalization and contrast enhancement. Implemented PCA to reduce high-dimensional pixel matrices to critical eigen-features, preserving 95% variance. Trained a multi-class SVM classifier with Radial Basis Function (RBF) kernel, achieving 94.6% accuracy while reducing model inference time by 60% for edge integrations.

title: Porter Airlines Booking Services (CANADA)
description: Development of booking add-ons services for Porter Airlines reservation workflows. Designed solution architecture for booking authentication and integrated payment providers like Hopper and Spreedly for Delay Guarantee products.
detailedDescription: Served as a Backend/Fullstack Engineer on the ticketing system of Porter Airlines (Canada). Designed booking flow authentication schemes utilizing AWS Cognito. Refactored legacy WebForms modules into RESTful, service-based components to improve system maintainability. Integrated international third-party APIs (Hopper, Spreedly payment gateways) to support Delay Guarantee insurances.

title: Singapore Government CMS Migrations (MOE & MPA)
description: Migration of government content management systems from Sitecore and Sitefinity to Directus headless CMS with high data integrity and minimal downtime. Built custom Vue.js extensions for non-technical content editors.
detailedDescription: Collaborated on Singapore Ministry of Education (MOE) and Maritime and Port Authority (MPA) portals. Designed custom database models and ETL scripts to migrate legacy content to Directus Headless CMS. Implemented secure role-based access control (RBAC) and content approval workflows. Developed customized Vue.js components to customize Directus layout panel controls.

title: ON.E (LUNA) - Enterprise E-commerce Platform
description: Development and optimization of backend APIs for order checkouts, coupons, product bundles, and product detail pages (PDP). Integrated Sitecore OrderCloud, Sitecore Search, and Akeneo PIM ecosystems.
detailedDescription: Designed high-throughput API endpoints supporting e-commerce campaigns, product bundles, orders, and promotion flows. Integrated Akeneo PIM for product catalog sync and Sitecore OrderCloud for commerce orchestration. Designed scalable API contracts consumed by multiple React web applications. Optimized database queries reducing page loading times on PLP/PDP by 25%.

title: FPT Software Corporate Website
description: Development of user interface components for the global FPT Software website, integrating Sitecore XP CMS for dynamic content personalization and marketing tracking.
detailedDescription: Contributed to FPT Software global site revamp. Coded responsive UI components matching strict design specifications using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. Bound frontend components to ASP.NET Core and Sitecore XP CMS properties, enabling marketing teams to personalize headers and contents dynamically.

title: Industrial Monitoring & Management Support System
description: An industrial environment monitoring and management system. Awarded First Prize at the Provincial Science & Technology Competition and Third Prize at the Vietnam National Science & Technology Competition.
detailedDescription: Developed a full-scale monitoring suite that interfaces with environmental hardware sensors (temperature, humidity, gas leak). Implemented RS-232 serial communication protocol to read telemetry logs in real-time. Built a C# WinForms desktop control center containing charts and warning mechanisms. Recognized with national-level scientific awards for high school research.
